title.en: DEVICES FOR MOVING WINGS INTO OPEN OR CLOSED POSITION; CHECKS FOR WINGS; WING FITTINGS NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDED FOR, CONCERNED WITH THE FUNCTIONING OF THE WING
Closers or openers for wings, not otherwise provided for in this subclass
{controlled by automatically acting means (for powered-operated mechanisms E05F15/70)}
gravity-actuated {, e.g. by use of counterweights}
spring-actuated {, e.g. for horizontally sliding wings (counterbalancing sliding or lifting wings E05D; springs per se F16F, e.g. gas-springs F16F9/00)}

Closers or openers with braking devices, e.g. checks; Construction of pneumatic or liquid braking devices (construction of non-pneumatic or non-liquid braking devices E05F5/00; friction devices in hinges E05D11/08)
with pneumatic piston brakes (rotary type E05F3/14)
with liquid piston brakes (rotary type E05F3/14)
with fluid brakes of the rotary type
with friction brakes
with counteracting springs (double-acting springs E05F1/14)
in hinges
Additional arrangements for closers, e.g. for holding the wing in opened or other position

Braking devices, e.g. checks; Stops; Buffers (construction of pneumatic or liquid braking devices E05F3/00; braking devices, buffers or end stops on drawers for tables, cabinets or like furniture A47B88/473; combined with devices for holding wings open E05C17/00; devices for limiting opening of wings or for holding wings open by a movable member extending between frame and wing E05C17/04)
{for sliding wings (Fasteners specially adapted for holding sliding wings open E05D13/04)}
{for hinges having a cup-shaped fixing part, e.g. for attachment to cabinets or furniture}
specially for preventing the slamming of {swinging} wings {during final closing movement, e.g. jamb stops}
Buffers {or stops limiting opening of swinging wings, e.g. floor or wall stops}(E05F5/02 takes precedence)
specially for preventing the closing of a wing before another wing has been closed
Accessories for wings not provided for in other groups of this subclass (specially adapted for furniture A47B95/00; door-lifters B66F, E04F21/00; knobs or handles E05B)
{Aligning devices for wings}
for raising wings before being turned {(before sliding E05D15/565)}
Arrangements affording protection against rattling (with buffering action E05F5/00)
Devices for taking the weight of the wing, arranged away from the hinge axis

Means for transmitting movements between vertical and horizontal sliding bars, rods, or cables (means for transmitting movements between vertical and horizontal sliding bars, rods, or cables, for the fastening of wings E05C9/24 {; with means for transmitting movements between vertical and horizontal sliding bars, rods or cables E05D15/5208})
Means for operating wings by hand rods not guided in or on the frame, including those which also operate the fastening (bolts or fastening devices for wings E05C)
Man-operated mechanisms for operating wings, including those which also operate the fastening (connecting mechanisms for a plurality of wings E05F17/00)
for wings in general, e.g. fanlights (E05F11/36 takes precedence; for windows to be lowered vertically E05F11/38; for doors E05F11/54)
specially designed for passing through a wall
for sliding windows, e.g. vehicle windows, to be opened or closed by vertical movement
for sliding windows, e.g. vehicle windows, to be opened or closed by horizontal movement
for doors
Mechanisms operated by the movement or weight of a person or vehicle (through power-operated wing-operating mechanisms E05F15/00)
by devices, e.g. lever arms, affected by the movement of the user
by platforms lowered by the weight of the user
Power-operated mechanisms for wings (motor-operated accessories in locks for completing closing or initiating opening of a wing E05B17/00)
Safety devices, e.g. detection of obstructions or end positions
using fluid-pressure actuators
using electrical actuators
with automatic actuation
Special devices for shifting a plurality of wings operated simultaneously (for simultaneously moving a plurality of interconnected ventilating lamellae E06B7/086)
{of prison cell doors}
{for wings which lie one behind the other when closed}
{for wings which abut when closed}
{for sliding wings}
{for swinging wings}
